product.name: LED Dimmable Ceiling Spotlight 12W 3CCT 3000K/4000K/5000K Adjustable Indoor Directional Spotlight Fixtures for Room Living Hallway Gallery Art Light,CRI93 1200LM (Black - 12 Watts)
features: 【Attention】 Before purchasing the lamps, please buyers check the size of the lamps, so as to avoid installation problems when installing. (Fixture size: diameter - 3.94 inches, height - 3.94 inches)

【3CCT Dimmable】This ceiling spotlight offers 3 colour temperature settings: 3000K (Warm White), 4000K (Cool White), 5000K (Daylight).10%-100% smooth dimming (compatible with most dimmers), Rotates 360° left and right, 90° up and down.can be used to illuminate a specific area precisely as needed, whether it is rotating, tilting or positioning, you can flexibly adjust the lighting angle and position to achieve a customized lighting design.
【Lamp material】thickened aluminium, accelerate heat dissipation, longer life. The surface of the lamps use baking paint process, not easy to damage.
【Light source 】LED 12W chip energy efficient, lumen 1200, brightness equivalent to 90W incandescent lamp. CRI 93+ (restore true colours), Beam degree: 24°. Service life 50,000 hours.
【Use Scene】suitable for living room, kitchen, hall, room, storage room, corridor, art lighting, plant lights.

【Installation and Service】the package comes with instructions, we support free return within 1 year and free replacement within 3 years Service. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us for customer service support.
